zh.lifeSummary: Matilda Strange是Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere和Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer的女兒，於1333年出生在英國史洛普爾其其。她於大約1350年與Sir Brian Cornwall MP在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1391年之後在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Matilda Strange是Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere和Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer的女儿，于1333年出生在英国史洛普爾其其。她于大约1350年与Sir Brian Cornwall MP在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1391年之后在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Strange
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire): nickname for a newcomer to a district, from Middle English strange ‘foreign’ (Old French estrange, Latin extraneus, from extra ‘outside’).

Irish (Antrim): this name is also common in Ireland, where, in addition to its English etymology, it may represent an Anglicized form of any of several Irish names containing the element gall ‘stranger’, e.g. Doyle , Gallagher .

variants.name: Stranger
meanings: English: nickname for a newcomer to an area, from Middle English stra(u)nger(e) ‘stranger, foreigner’ (Old French estrangier). Compare Strange .

variants.name: Doyle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Sean, Kieran, Seamus, Aileen, Dermot, Liam, Niall, Brennan, Brigid, Conal, Conan, Donal.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhghaill ‘descendant of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was used as a byname for Scandinavians, in particular to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDougall , McDowell .

variants.name: Lestrange
meanings: Irish and English: variant of Strange 1 with fused Old French definite article le.

Irish: in Ireland, adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche ‘son of Cúchoigcriche’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the borderland’. Lestrange was adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche probably due to the presence of a prominent family of Lestrange, of similar meaning, who settled in the counties of Westmeath and Offaly in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Matilda Strange was born in 1333, in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England as the daughter of Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere and Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer. She married Sir Brian Cornwall MP about 1350, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1391, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Matilda Strange est née en 1333, à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre, fille de Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere et Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer. Elle a épousé Sir Brian Cornwall MP environ 1350, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1391, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Matilda Strange wurde 1333 in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, als Tochter von Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere und Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer geboren. Sie hat um 1350 in England Sir Brian Cornwall MP geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1391 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Matilda Strange è nata il nel 1333 nel Whitchurch, Shropshire, England come figlia di Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere e Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer. Lei sposato Sir Brian Cornwall MP circa 1350, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1391, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Strangeは1333年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィトチャーチでSir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of BlackmereとLady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmerの娘として生まれた。約1350年にイギリスでSir Brian Cornwall MPと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1391年以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Strange(은)는 1333년 영국 슈럽실르 휘트c후르치에서 Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere(와)과 Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1350년 영국에서 Sir Brian Cornwall MP(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Matilda Strange nasceu em 1333, em Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra filha de Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere e Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer. Ela casou-se com Sir Brian Cornwall MP aproximadamente 1350, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1391, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Matilda Strange родилась в 1333 г. в местности уичурч, шропшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere и Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Brian Cornwall MP около 1350 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1391 г. в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Matilda Strange nació en 1333, en Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra como hija de Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere y Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer. Se casó con Sir Brian Cornwall MP aproximadamente 1350, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1391, en Inglaterra.
